title: These 5 AI-proof jobs are hiring — here’s how much they pay and how to get them
summary: Jobs resistant to AI disruption typically require physical presence, specialized training, or real-time human interaction. These sectors are currently hiring and offer career stability amid automation concerns. Understanding these job categories can help workers navigate the evolving job market.
content: Careers that are not as vulnerable to AI right now share a few common traits: they require physical presence, specialized training, or real-time human interaction.

zh.title: 这5个防AI工作正在招聘——薪资多少以及如何应聘
zh.summary: 抗AI颠覆的工作通常需要实际操作、专业培训或实时人类互动。这些行业目前正在招聘，并在自动化担忧中提供职业稳定性。了解这些工作类别可以帮助工作者在不断变化的就业市场中做出导航。

title: Housing estate residents see energy bills frozen
summary: Newcastle City Council has frozen energy bills for Byker Wall housing estate residents, aiming to provide financial stability and certainty. This policy move represents a local government response to energy cost pressures affecting residents.
content: Newcastle City Council hopes the move will offer Byker Wall homeowners "stability and certainty".

zh.title: 住宅小区居民能源账单被冻结
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔市议会已冻结Byker Wall住宅小区居民的能源账单，旨在为居民提供财务稳定性和确定性。这一政策举措代表了地方政府对影响居民的能源成本压力的回应。

title: Mortgage rates are rising again, but homebuyers are trickling back
summary: Mortgage rates increased this week after a period of decline, dampening refinance activity but failing to deter homebuyers from returning to the market. The resilience of homebuyers despite rate increases signals potential stability in housing demand.
content: Mortgage rates rose last week after several weeks of declines. That took a toll on refinance demand, but homebuyers seem more resilient.

zh.title: 抵押贷款利率再次上升，但购房者正在缓慢回归
zh.summary: 抵押贷款利率在下降一段时间后本周再次上升，打压了再融资活动，但未能阻止购房者重返市场。购房者尽管利率上升但仍具有复原力，预示着住房需求可能保持稳定。

title: A million-dollar gold bear emerges ahead of the Fed decision
summary: A trader has made a significant options bet against gold prices through a complex trade involving short calls and long puts on the SPDR Gold ETF ahead of Federal Reserve decisions. This large positioning suggests expectations for gold price declines in response to Fed policy.
content: Someone sold upside call exposure in the SPDR Gold ETF (GLD) while simultaneously buying downside put exposure in a two-pronged trade.

zh.title: 美联储决议前现身百万美元黄金空头头寸
zh.summary: 一位交易员在美联储决议前通过复杂的期权交易对黄金价格进行了重大的空头押注，该交易涉及SPDR黄金ETF的空头看涨期权和多头看跌期权。这种大规模的头寸表明交易员预期黄金价格将因美联储政策而下跌。

title: The next recession could actually be a win for stocks — if you can tune out the market noise
summary: A potential recession may not necessarily harm stock market performance if investors focus on corporate profit margins and valuation multiples rather than GDP forecasts. This perspective suggests that investor discipline and proper valuation analysis could yield returns even in an economic downturn.
content: Corporate profit margins and P/E multiples — not GDP forecasts — are the real tools to surviving a bear market.

zh.title: 下一次衰退可能对股票市场有利——如果你能忽视市场噪音的话
zh.summary: 如果投资者专注于企业利润率和估值倍数而非GDP预测，潜在的经济衰退可能不会对股票市场表现造成负面影响。这一观点表明，投资者的纪律性和恰当的估值分析即使在经济衰退期间也可能产生回报。

title: SoFi just set a slew of lending records, but here’s why its stock is falling
summary: SoFi beat quarterly expectations and achieved record lending volumes but failed to raise its full-year guidance, disappointing investors. The company's inability to provide a positive outlook despite strong quarterly results has pressured its stock price.
content: The company didn’t raise its full-year outlook despite beating expectations in the latest quarter.

zh.title: SoFi刚创造多项借贷纪录，但这是其股票下跌的原因
zh.summary: SoFi超越季度预期并实现创纪录的借贷量，但未能提高全年指导预期，令投资者感到失望。尽管季度业绩强劲，但公司无法提供积极前景，这对其股价造成了压力。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Palantir, CoreWeave, Robinhood, Victoria's Secret, Starbucks & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant recommendations on Wednesday covering companies including Palantir, CoreWeave, Robinhood, Victoria's Secret, and Starbucks. These analyst calls provide guidance on market sentiment and individual stock valuations.
content: Here are Wednesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周三最大的分析师评级：Palantir、CoreWeave、Robinhood、维多利亚的秘密、星巴克及更多
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师在周三发布了重要评级建议，涵盖包括Palantir、CoreWeave、Robinhood、维多利亚的秘密和星巴克等公司。这些分析师评级为市场情绪和个股估值提供了指导意见。

title: JPMorgan’s Jamie Dimon says a credit-led recession would be ‘worse than people think’
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon warned that a recession triggered by credit market stress would be more severe and widespread than market expectations. His comments suggest that credit system weakness could trigger economic damage beyond the private credit sector.
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon says an economic downturn sparked by weakness in credit would encompass more than just the private credit segment and be more severe than many expect.

zh.title: 摩根大通的杰米·戴蒙表示，信贷引发的衰退会"比人们想象的更糟"
zh.summary: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙警告称，由信贷市场压力引发的衰退将比市场预期更加严重和广泛。他的评论表明，信贷系统的弱点可能会引发超出私人信贷部门范围的经济损害。

title: OpenAI looms over earnings from tech hyperscalers
summary: Tech giants Amazon, Alphabet, Meta, and Microsoft will report quarterly earnings with OpenAI expected to be a major discussion point across all earnings calls. The focus on OpenAI reflects investor interest in how major tech companies are capitalizing on recent AI developments.
content: Amazon, Alphabet, Meta and Microsoft report quarterly results after the bell, and OpenAI is likely to be a big topic across the board.

zh.title: OpenAI笼罩科技巨头的财报公布
zh.summary: 亚马逊、字母表、Meta和微软等科技巨头将公布季度财报，预计OpenAI将成为所有财报电话会议中的主要讨论话题。对OpenAI的关注反映了投资者对科技巨头如何利用近期AI发展的兴趣。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Seagate, Robinhood, Humana, Generac & more
summary: Several stocks including Seagate, Robinhood, Humana, and Generac are experiencing significant premarket trading moves. These stock movements may signal market sentiment ahead of the regular trading session.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前股票大幅波动：西数、罗宾汉、联合健康、吉纳瑞克等
zh.summary: 包括西数、罗宾汉、联合健康和吉纳瑞克在内的多只股票在盘前交易中出现大幅波动。这些股票走势可能预示着正常交易时段前的市场情绪。

title: The key global oil contract tops $115 as Strait of Hormuz impasse continues
summary: Global oil prices surged to $115 per barrel as shipping disruptions continue through the Strait of Hormuz amid Middle East tensions. The lack of progress in resolving the impasse is sustaining elevated oil prices reminiscent of early Iran war levels.
content: Oil futures rallied further Wednesday, with the key contract nearing its highs reached in the early days of the Iran war with little progress made on getting oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 随着霍尔木兹海峡僵局持续，全球主要石油合约突破115美元
zh.summary: 由于中东局势紧张导致霍尔木兹海峡航运中断继续，全球油价飙升至每桶115美元。在解决僵局方面缺乏进展正在维持油价处于高位，这让人想起伊朗战争初期的油价水平。

title: Finland’s Kone to buy German rival TK Elevator in blockbuster $34.4 billion deal
summary: Finnish company Kone has agreed to acquire German rival TK Elevator for $34.4 billion, creating the world's largest elevator manufacturer. This major European acquisition represents significant industry consolidation in the elevator sector.
content: The combination would create the world’s largest elevator maker and marks one of Europe's biggest takeovers in recent years.

zh.title: 芬兰康力电梯公司以344亿美元收购德国竞争对手蒂森克虏伯电梯
zh.summary: 芬兰公司康力电梯已同意以344亿美元收购德国竞争对手蒂森克虏伯电梯，创建全球最大的电梯制造商。这项重大欧洲并购交易代表了电梯行业的重要整合。

title: Oil price jumps to $115 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
summary: Crude oil prices jumped to $115 per barrel following reports of an extended blockade related to Iran amid Middle East tensions. The geopolitical uncertainty is driving volatile and elevated oil prices.
content: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.

zh.title: 伊朗封锁延长报告后油价跳升至115美元
zh.summary: 在伊朗相关长期封锁报告发布后，原油价格跳升至每桶115美元，中东局势紧张。地缘政治不确定性推高油价波动和上升。

title: Why this Soros alum is betting on copper and cables over AI chips
summary: Renaud Saleur, a George Soros fund alumnus, is investing in copper and infrastructure-related commodities rather than AI chip stocks. He believes megatrends in electrification, natural resources, and physical infrastructure offer better opportunities than AI technology stocks.
content: Renaud Saleur is looking past politics to bank on megatrends like electrification, natural resources and AI bricks and mortars.

zh.title: 索罗斯校友为何押注铜和电缆而非AI芯片
zh.summary: 乔治·索罗斯基金校友勒诺·萨勒尔投资铜和基础设施相关商品，而非AI芯片股票。他认为电气化、自然资源和物理基础设施的大趋势提供了比AI技术股票更好的机会。

title: ‘Dirty soda’ is going mainstream. Coke and Pepsi are trying to cash in.
summary: Coca-Cola and PepsiCo are capitalizing on the growing "dirty soda" trend with products like Coca-Cola Cherry Float and Dirty Mountain Dew to boost flagging sales. Other beverage manufacturers are also entering the category as the unconventional soda flavors gain mainstream consumer appeal.
content: Drinks like Dirty Mountain Dew and Coca-Cola Cherry Float are helping the two beverage giants prop up sales. Other major brands are jumping in on the trend as well.

zh.title: "脏苏打"走向主流，可口可乐和百事正试图从中获利
zh.summary: 可口可乐和百事公司利用"脏苏打"趋势推出樱桃浮动可口可乐和脏山露等产品来提振销售。随着非常规苏打口味获得主流消费者认可，其他饮料制造商也在进入这一类别。

title: UAE's departure from the OPEC oil cartel is not without precedence. Who could be next?
summary: The UAE's exit from OPEC signals potential shifts in the global oil cartel, raising questions about which other members might follow suit. This departure could reshape international energy markets and pricing dynamics.
content: The United Arab Emirates' decision to leave OPEC is reverberating across global energy markets, sparking questions on who else could follow.

zh.title: 阿联酋退出欧佩克石油卡特尔并非前所未有。谁可能接下来？
zh.summary: 阿联酋退出欧佩克预示全球石油卡特尔可能发生转变，引发其他成员是否会跟风的疑问。这一撤出可能重塑国际能源市场和定价动态。

title: UBS profits rocket 80% to $3 billion for first quarter beat
summary: UBS reported first-quarter net profits of $3 billion, an 80% increase that exceeded analyst expectations. The results signal recovery in the banking sector following recent market volatility.
content: UBS reported its first quarter earnings on Wednesday, with net profits beating analyst estimates.

zh.title: 瑞银集团利润飙升80%至30亿美元，超出第一季度预期
zh.summary: 瑞银集团报告第一季度净利润30亿美元，同比增长80%，超过分析师预期。这些结果表明银行业在近期市场波动后正在复苏。

title: CNBC Daily Open: UAE leaves OPEC adrift
summary: The UAE's unexpected exit from OPEC is creating uncertainty in global oil markets as investors navigate multiple economic developments simultaneously. A Federal Reserve decision adds to today's market volatility.
content: Markets grapple with the UAE's shock OPEC exit, while also contending with a host of earnings reports and a Fed decision later today.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：阿联酋离开欧佩克陷入困境
zh.summary: 阿联酋意外退出欧佩克在全球石油市场制造不确定性，投资者需同时应对多项经济发展。美联储的决定进一步加剧今日市场波动。

title: Struggling families offered heating oil vouchers
summary: A council is offering £150 heating oil vouchers to families struggling with energy costs, providing relief amid high fuel prices. The program targets households at risk of running out of heating fuel.
content: People can apply for a £150 grant if they are running out of heating oil, a council says.

zh.title: 困难家庭获得取暖油代金券
zh.summary: 一个地方议会向在能源成本方面困难的家庭提供150英镑的取暖油代金券，在高燃料价格时期提供救济。该计划针对有取暖燃料用尽风险的家庭。

title: Major data center company pauses investment decisions in Middle East amid Iran war, CEO tells CNBC
summary: A major data center company is halting investment decisions in the Middle East due to regional instability stemming from Iran-related conflict. The pause reflects concerns about the viability of AI infrastructure projects in the region.
content: Regional uncertainty hangs over the previously booming AI infrastructure and data center sector in the region.

zh.title: 主要数据中心公司暂停中东投资决策，首席执行官告诉CNBC
zh.summary: 一家主要数据中心公司由于伊朗相关冲突导致的地区不稳定性而暂停了在中东的投资决策。这一暂停反映了人们对该地区人工智能基础设施项目可行性的担忧。

title: Australia reports lower-than-expected first-quarter inflation — but price growth hits 2-year high
summary: Australia's first-quarter inflation came in below the expected 4.2%, offering some relief from price pressures. However, price growth still reached a two-year high, maintaining pressure on consumer purchasing power.
content: The first-quarter inflation figure was lower than the 4.2% expected by economists polled by Reuters.

zh.title: 澳大利亚第一季度通胀率低于预期——但价格增长达到两年高位
zh.summary: 澳大利亚第一季度通胀率低于预期的4.2%，为价格压力提供了一些缓解。然而，价格增长仍然达到两年高位，对消费者购买力造成持续压力。

title: U.S. warns banks of sanctions risk over China ‘teapot’ refineries handling Iranian oil
summary: The U.S. has issued a warning to banks about sanctions risks related to China's small refineries processing Iranian oil. The alert highlights geopolitical tension around Iran's oil sales, which represent a major revenue source.
content: The alert said China purchases approximately 90% of Iran's oil exports, with teapot refineries accounting for the majority of these imports.

zh.title: 美国警告银行中国"小炼油厂"处理伊朗石油的制裁风险
zh.summary: 美国已就中国小炼油厂加工伊朗石油相关的制裁风险向银行发出警告。该警告强调了围绕伊朗石油销售的地缘政治紧张局势，这代表了一笔主要收入来源。

title: Pentagon AI chief confirms DOD's expanded use of Google, says reliance on one model 'never a good thing'
summary: The Pentagon's AI chief confirmed the Defense Department's expanded use of Google's Gemini following Anthropic's blacklisting from federal contracts. The chief cautioned against over-reliance on a single AI model for national security applications.
content: The Pentagon's AI chief discussed the DOD's expanded use of Google Gemini after the blacklisting of Anthropic.

zh.title: 五角大楼AI主管确认国防部扩大使用谷歌，称依赖单一模型"绝非好事"
zh.summary: 五角大楼AI主管证实国防部在Anthropic被列入联邦合同黑名单后，扩大了对谷歌Gemini的使用。该主管警告不要过度依赖单一AI模型用于国家安全应用。

title: Two investment strategies for people who are afraid of the stock market
summary: For investors wary of stock market volatility, protective ETF strategies offer a way to maintain exposure while limiting downside risk. These approaches balance growth potential with capital preservation for cautious investors.
content: ETFs with protection features can help risk-averse investors increase returns while weathering market storms.

zh.title: 害怕股票市场的人的两种投资策略
zh.summary: 对于担心股票市场波动的投资者，保护性ETF策略提供了一种维持敞口同时限制下行风险的方式。这些方法为谨慎的投资者平衡了增长潜力和资本保护。

title: Purdue Pharma receives $5.5 billion sentence, paving way for opioid settlement
summary: Purdue Pharma received a $5.5 billion sentence for deceiving regulators and paying doctors to increase opioid prescriptions, a major step in the opioid crisis reckoning. The penalty clears the path for broader opioid settlement agreements.
content: Purdue Pharma was sentenced Tuesday to $5.5 billion in fines and penalties on charges of deceiving regulators and paying doctors to boost opioid sales.

zh.title: 普渡制药因阿片类药物危机获得55亿美元罚单，为和解铺路
zh.summary: 普渡制药因欺骗监管机构和向医生行贿以增加阿片类药物处方而获得55亿美元罚单，这是阿片类药物危机清算中的重大进展。该罚款为更广泛的阿片类药物和解协议铺平了道路。

title: Can Meta make money on AI beyond consumer ads? That’s a big question going into earnings.
summary: As Meta reports earnings, investors are questioning whether the company can monetize artificial intelligence beyond consumer advertising. This uncertainty about AI diversification could influence Meta's valuation and growth prospects.
content: While Meta Platforms has shaped up to be good at monetizing artificial intelligence in consumer-facing advertising, some analysts question whether the company’s AI models have applications beyond that.

zh.title: Meta能否通过消费者广告以外的AI赚钱？这是财报前的关键问题
zh.summary: 当Meta公布财报时，投资者质疑该公司是否能在消费者广告以外的领域通过人工智能实现货币化。关于AI多元化的这种不确定性可能会影响Meta的估值和增长前景。

title: U.A.E. is leaving OPEC but will still need to exercise caution as it increases oil production
summary: The UAE is leaving OPEC at week's end, surprising observers given ongoing global oil production disruptions and Middle East tensions. The move signals the UAE's intent to independently increase oil production while navigating geopolitical risks. This departure highlights shifting dynamics within OPEC and regional energy strategy.
content: The United Arab Amirates decision to leave the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries at the end of the week came as a surprise to some, especially during a time of severe global disruptions to oil production and passage through in the Middle East.

zh.title: 阿联酋离开欧佩克，但在增加石油产量时仍需谨慎
zh.summary: 阿联酋将在本周末离开欧佩克，这在全球石油生产中断和中东紧张局势持续的背景下令人惊讶。此举标志着阿联酋打算独立增加石油产量，同时应对地缘政治风险。这一决定凸显了欧佩克内部和地区能源战略动态的变化。

title: Starbucks is seeing a resurgence, thanks to younger and lower-income customers
summary: Starbucks is experiencing renewed growth driven by expansion into younger and lower-income customer segments. The company raised its financial guidance after sales exceeded analyst expectations. This resurgence demonstrates successful market expansion beyond its traditional demographic.
content: Coffee chain hikes outlook as sales top Wall Street’s hopes

zh.title: 星巴克因年轻和低收入消费者而迎来复兴
zh.summary: 星巴克通过向年轻和低收入消费者群体扩展而实现增长复苏。公司在销售超过分析师预期后提高了财务指引。这一复兴展示了超越传统消费者群体的成功市场扩展。

title: Here’s where Robinhood’s retail traders have flocked as the Iran conflict rages on
summary: Robinhood retail traders have increasingly turned to prediction markets as a refuge during geopolitical volatility stemming from Iran conflicts. These markets offer traders a way to hedge against traditional market instability. The shift reflects changing risk management strategies among retail investors.
content: Prediction markets have been a haven for Robinhood traders seeking to ride out volatility.

zh.title: 伊朗冲突持续之际罗宾汉零售交易者纷纷涌向的地方
zh.summary: 随着伊朗冲突引发的地缘政治波动，罗宾汉零售交易者越来越多地转向预测市场作为避难所。这些市场为交易者提供了应对传统市场不稳定性的对冲方式。这一转变反映了零售投资者风险管理策略的变化。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open mixed after OPEC shock, tech jitters drag Wall Street lower
summary: Asian markets opened with mixed results following the OPEC shock, while Wall Street declined as tech stocks faced selling pressure. The decline was triggered by reports that OpenAI's revenue and user growth fell short of internal targets. This weakness in the AI sector signals potential headwinds for tech-heavy portfolios.
content: Optimism around tech stocks took hit as the Wall Street Journal reported that OpenAI's revenue and new users growth was below its own targets.

zh.title: 亚太市场在欧佩克冲击后开盘不一，科技股担忧拖累华尔街下跌
zh.summary: 亚洲市场在欧佩克冲击后开盘涨跌不一，华尔街因科技股抛售压力而下跌。下跌是由OpenAI收入和用户增长未达内部目标的报告引发的。这种AI领域的疲软表现预示科技重仓投资组合可能面临逆风。
